baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 226 tests passed, 15 skipped.

tacticsIconUi.summary: Schedule tactics UI renders the tactics icon from the local /icons/tactics.svg asset instead of the external SVGRepo URL.

assetHttp.summary: Existing Next dev server returned 200 OK with Content-Type image/svg+xml for the local tactics SVG asset.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase contract check passed for 18 SQL files during the final guard run.

guardVerify.summary: Final verify guard passed after syncing this workstream: design guard passed for 1 guarded file, diff guard passed for 5 changed files, baseline passed, DB contract check passed, and evidence guard passed.

runtimeSmoke.summary: No app entrypoint, Auth/session/API bootstrap, package/runtime config, Supabase schema, or API route files changed. In-app browser visual check was attempted twice but blocked by Browser webview attach timeout.

issuesObserved: The original SVGRepo tactics and lock icon URLs were runtime dependencies; the tactics download endpoint returned a Vercel/Cloudflare challenge, so the UI could render broken external images in production.
The in-app browser validation path failed twice at webview attach timeout, so rendered browser evidence was limited to local HTTP asset verification and deterministic UI tests.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness change proposed; the existing asset provenance policy correctly forced reuse of a preserved local SVGRepo asset instead of recreating a blocked external asset.
retrospective.reason: The work removed external icon runtime dependency with a local asset and preserved existing UI behavior without exposing a repeatable harness gap.
